title: galium perpusillum
intro: Galium perpusillum, also known as small bedstraw, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium perpusillum include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Galium perpusillum is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
